_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Incorporates risk-driven systems maintenance updates process to address system deficiencies (periodically and out of cycle).
reference_document_element_description: Execute routine data platform maintenance tasks, including storage cleanup, job configuration updates, and operational documentation maintenance.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-021 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.479), AI-T-017 (AI, cosine: 0.472).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.481). Shared vocabulary: [maintenance, updates]. DCWF-only terms [address, cycle, deficiencies, driven, incorporates, periodically] vs WIDAI-only terms [cleanup, configuration, data, documentation, execute, job] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.849, R=0.881). R exceeds P by 0.033 — the WIDAI KSA's 16 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 15 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "Incorporates risk-driven systems maintenance updates process to address system d" and "Execute routine data platform maintenance tasks, including storage cleanup, job" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.499 ≈ STS 0.481 (gap 0.018). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [maintenance, updates] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [maintenance, updates]. DCWF-only: [address, cycle, deficiencies, driven, incorporates, periodically]. WIDAI-only: [cleanup, configuration, data, documentation, execute, job].
